summary: Tested NEW feature: Achats Caisse → Stock Entrées synchronization. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Dashboard shows Entrées/Sorties Aujourd'hui, Movements page displays 'Achat Caisse' and 'Vente' reasons correctly. Regression test for existing Ventes → Stock Sorties also passed.

issues: Minor: Console warning about HTML hydration (<tr> inside <span>) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/expenses - Create grouped expense (is_group=true with items[])
✅ Backend: PUT /api/expenses/{id} status='completed' - Creates 'entree' movements in stock_movements
✅ Backend: Stock quantity increases when expense is completed (Carotte: qty increased by 10)
✅ Backend: Simple expense (is_group=false) with description matching stock product creates entree
✅ Backend: Expense with unmatched items creates 'non lié au stock' movement
✅ Backend: No double sync if expense already 'completed' (idempotent)
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/dashboard - returns entrees_today and sorties_today
✅ Backend: GET /api/stock/movements - returns movements with type, reason, expense_id/invoice_id
✅ Frontend: /stock Dashboard shows 'Entrées Aujourd'hui: 11' and 'Sorties Aujourd'hui: 5'
✅ Frontend: /stock Dashboard shows 'Ventes Caisse du jour' card with sales count
✅ Frontend: Movements page shows 'Entree' badges (green) with 'Achat Caisse' reason
✅ Frontend: Movements page shows 'Sortie' badges (red) with 'Vente - Facture' reason
✅ Frontend: Movements page shows 'Achat Caisse (non lié au stock)' for unmatched items
critical_code_review_comments: Stock sync logic in update_expense (line 5249-5352) correctly handles: grouped expenses with items[], simple expenses with description, unmatched items, and prevents double sync
Product matching uses 3-tier regex: exact match → starts-with → contains (case-insensitive)
Stock movements include expense_id for traceability
seed_data_creation: Test expenses created during testing with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Achats Caisse → Stock sync feature fully working. When expense status changes to 'completed', stock_movements are created with type='entree' and reason='Achat Caisse - {supplier}'. Product matching is by name (regex). Unmatched items create movements with product_id='' and reason contains 'non lié au stock'. Dashboard shows entrees_today/sorties_today counts. Existing Ventes → Stock sync (invoice validation) still works.

expense_to_stock_sync.notes: PUT /api/expenses/{id} with status='completed' creates stock entree movements

grouped_expense_items.notes: is_group=true with items[] array - each item creates separate movement

simple_expense_sync.notes: is_group=false - uses description field for product matching

unmatched_items.notes: Items not matching stock products create 'non lié au stock' movements

double_sync_prevention.notes: Re-completing already completed expense doesn't create duplicate movements

invoice_to_stock_sync.notes: Invoice validation creates 'sortie' movements - existing feature still works

stock_movements_page.notes: Shows Entree/Sortie badges with Achat Caisse/Vente reasons
